programme.title: Mercedes-Benz UCI Mountain Bike World Cup 2022
programme.desc: Enjoy a full recap of all the downhill from action Lenzerheide, Switzerland, the halfway point of the UCI Mountain Bike World Cup 2022, as Rachel Atherton returned to action after a three-year hiatus.
programme.series-desc: Catch up on all the DH action from Lenzerheide, the halfway point of the UCI Mountain Bike World Cup 2022.

programme.title: FIA World Rally-Raid Championship
programme.desc: The long-established Abu Dhabi Desert Challenge maintains its position as Round 2 and offers the challenge of towering sand dunes and baking heat in the remote UAE deserts.
programme.series-desc: Round 2 of the Abu Dhabi Desert Challenge offers challenging sand dunes and baking heat in remote UAE deserts.

programme.title: Goodwood Festival of Speed 2019
programme.desc: This annual celebration of motorsports sees cars and motorbikes race Goodwood's famous Hillclimb track. The party also includes a rally stage, a classic car concourse and Red Arrows demonstrations.
programme.series-desc: Cars and motorbikes race up a hill, and fans can also enjoy a rally stage, classic cars and Red Arrows demos.

programme.title: FIA World Rally-Raid Championship
programme.desc: The legendary Abu Dhabi Desert Challenge, one of the world’s most prestigious international cross country rallies, has seen many of the biggest names in motorsport tackle the dunes of the UAE.
programme.series-desc: The legendary Abu Dhabi Desert Challenge is one of the world’s most prestigious cross country rallies.

programme.title: Red Bull Shay' iMoto 2019
programme.sub-title: Check out this crazy new motorsport
programme.desc: Squealing rubber, raging engines, dizzying revs and enough smoke to choke up a freight train. Welcome to the thrilling sport of spinning and the new bling event on the block: Red Bull Shay' iMoto.
programme.series-desc: Welcome to the dizzying, squealing rage of South Africa’s adrenaline-sparking motorsport: spinning.

programme.title: A flying contest like no other...
programme.desc: A flying contest like no other... where anyone and everyone can let their creativity fly and take a punt at launching their homemade machines and masterpieces into the abyss.

programme.title: Red Bull Soapbox Race
programme.desc: What do flying Italian bagpipes and South Africa's fastest Stone Age racer have in common? They both made the cut among 2018's best Red Bull Soapbox Race runs.
programme.series-desc: Italian bagpipes and South Africa's fastest Stone Age soapbox made the cut among 2018's very best runs.

programme.title: Giving it Gears with Jason Goliath
programme.desc: Jason and Nick track down endurance motorcyclist Kirsten Landman. After failing to beat her in a buggy-versus-bike race, Jason persuades her to join their team in the 2022 Red Bull Box Cart Race.
programme.series-desc: Jason and Nick track down endurance motorcyclist Kirsten Landman on sun-scorched dunes in Cape Town.

programme.title: The Stream
programme.sub-title: A Weighty Debate - The Obesity Epidemic
programme.desc: Today on The Stream: We look at why our waistlines are expanding at an alarming rate.
programme.series-desc:
The Stream is a daily television programme on Al Jazeera English. It is branded as a “Web community With a Global TV show”. On television and online The Stream taps into the extraordinary potential of social media to disseminate news. The Stream is an aggregator of online sources and discussion, seeking out unheard voices, new perspectives from people on the ground and untold angles related to the most compelling stories of the day.
Previously, the show was hosted by Derrick Ashong and Imran Garda. Lisa Fletcher replaced them as the new presenter. On June 25, 2012, the Stream was relaunched with a new studio and opening graphics. Femi Oke replaced Fletcher when Fletcher was picked to host a version of The Stream on Al Jazeera America.

programme.title: Witness
programme.desc: Inspirational and provocative stories providing a fresh and informative insight into the world's key events as they impact on the lives of ordinary people.
programme.series-desc: Yu Kyung is a successful woman who is proficient enough to become an executive director of Chunha Group when she started as a secretary. She recently found out her daughter is alive, so she plans to get her back and take her revenge. Meanwhile, Hye Soo is a strong girl who faces challenges head-on. She has a daughter with Ji Ho, and she would do anything for her. However, she gets tragically betrayed by Ji Ho, the love of her life, over power and money. How will those two mothers end their fierce revenge?

programme.series-desc: A news show hosted by Kiryu Coco in which she summarizes the events of the day before. Coco-Kaichou often pitches products as commercial breaks such as her drug AsaCoco which can be inhaled, injected or consumed as a drink. It is tradition to watch Cocos AsaCoco Live News and afterwards Tsunomaki Watames "Watame no Uta" (early morning karaoke format with viewer rock-paper-scissor).

programme.title: The Stream
programme.desc: The Stream is where Al Jazeera's audience becomes a global community.
programme.series-desc:
The Stream is a daily television programme on Al Jazeera English. It is branded as a “Web community With a Global TV show”. On television and online The Stream taps into the extraordinary potential of social media to disseminate news. The Stream is an aggregator of online sources and discussion, seeking out unheard voices, new perspectives from people on the ground and untold angles related to the most compelling stories of the day.
Previously, the show was hosted by Derrick Ashong and Imran Garda. Lisa Fletcher replaced them as the new presenter. On June 25, 2012, the Stream was relaunched with a new studio and opening graphics. Femi Oke replaced Fletcher when Fletcher was picked to host a version of The Stream on Al Jazeera America.

programme.title: Witness
programme.desc: Inspirational and provocative stories providing a fresh and informative insight into the world's key events as they impact on the lives of ordinary people.
programme.series-desc: Yu Kyung is a successful woman who is proficient enough to become an executive director of Chunha Group when she started as a secretary. She recently found out her daughter is alive, so she plans to get her back and take her revenge. Meanwhile, Hye Soo is a strong girl who faces challenges head-on. She has a daughter with Ji Ho, and she would do anything for her. However, she gets tragically betrayed by Ji Ho, the love of her life, over power and money. How will those two mothers end their fierce revenge?

programme.series-desc: A news show hosted by Kiryu Coco in which she summarizes the events of the day before. Coco-Kaichou often pitches products as commercial breaks such as her drug AsaCoco which can be inhaled, injected or consumed as a drink. It is tradition to watch Cocos AsaCoco Live News and afterwards Tsunomaki Watames "Watame no Uta" (early morning karaoke format with viewer rock-paper-scissor).

programme.title: Talk to Al Jazeera
programme.desc: Kazakhstan's President on navigating reforms and rising challenges from a key crossroads between Russia, China, and the West.
programme.series-desc:
Al Jazeera’s flagship interview show. A weekly one-on-one conversation with global leaders, icons, influencers, and alternative voices shaping our times.
We also interview the voiceless - individuals who by accident or choice find themselves in extraordinary events. On Talk to Al Jazeera - In the Field

programme.title: News Live

programme.title: The Stream
programme.desc: The Stream is where Al Jazeera's audience becomes a global community.
programme.series-desc:
The Stream is a daily television programme on Al Jazeera English. It is branded as a “Web community With a Global TV show”. On television and online The Stream taps into the extraordinary potential of social media to disseminate news. The Stream is an aggregator of online sources and discussion, seeking out unheard voices, new perspectives from people on the ground and untold angles related to the most compelling stories of the day.
Previously, the show was hosted by Derrick Ashong and Imran Garda. Lisa Fletcher replaced them as the new presenter. On June 25, 2012, the Stream was relaunched with a new studio and opening graphics. Femi Oke replaced Fletcher when Fletcher was picked to host a version of The Stream on Al Jazeera America.

programme.title: The Listening Post
programme.sub-title: The Sudden Surge of Genocide Critique in the West
programme.desc: A shady U.S.-Israel group takes over aid distribution in Gaza and as starvation worsens, some of Israel's allies finally start speaking up.
programme.series-desc: Listening Post is Al Jazeera English's weekly media review show. It casts a critical eye over not just what gets reported, but how it's reported - covering the coverage of the news & analyzing global events through the prism of the media.

programme.title: Witness
programme.desc: Inspirational and provocative stories providing a fresh and informative insight into the world's key events as they impact on the lives of ordinary people.
programme.series-desc: Yu Kyung is a successful woman who is proficient enough to become an executive director of Chunha Group when she started as a secretary. She recently found out her daughter is alive, so she plans to get her back and take her revenge. Meanwhile, Hye Soo is a strong girl who faces challenges head-on. She has a daughter with Ji Ho, and she would do anything for her. However, she gets tragically betrayed by Ji Ho, the love of her life, over power and money. How will those two mothers end their fierce revenge?

programme.title: The Stream
programme.desc: The Stream is where Al Jazeera's audience becomes a global community.
programme.series-desc:
The Stream is a daily television programme on Al Jazeera English. It is branded as a “Web community With a Global TV show”. On television and online The Stream taps into the extraordinary potential of social media to disseminate news. The Stream is an aggregator of online sources and discussion, seeking out unheard voices, new perspectives from people on the ground and untold angles related to the most compelling stories of the day.
Previously, the show was hosted by Derrick Ashong and Imran Garda. Lisa Fletcher replaced them as the new presenter. On June 25, 2012, the Stream was relaunched with a new studio and opening graphics. Femi Oke replaced Fletcher when Fletcher was picked to host a version of The Stream on Al Jazeera America.

programme.title: Witness
programme.desc: Inspirational and provocative stories providing a fresh and informative insight into the world's key events as they impact on the lives of ordinary people.
programme.series-desc: Yu Kyung is a successful woman who is proficient enough to become an executive director of Chunha Group when she started as a secretary. She recently found out her daughter is alive, so she plans to get her back and take her revenge. Meanwhile, Hye Soo is a strong girl who faces challenges head-on. She has a daughter with Ji Ho, and she would do anything for her. However, she gets tragically betrayed by Ji Ho, the love of her life, over power and money. How will those two mothers end their fierce revenge?

programme.series-desc: A news show hosted by Kiryu Coco in which she summarizes the events of the day before. Coco-Kaichou often pitches products as commercial breaks such as her drug AsaCoco which can be inhaled, injected or consumed as a drink. It is tradition to watch Cocos AsaCoco Live News and afterwards Tsunomaki Watames "Watame no Uta" (early morning karaoke format with viewer rock-paper-scissor).
